creator: gnikl@justmail.de
text:
@comment #5
> Next time you submit patches, please use something that also outputs all file creations and deletions.
Thank you for stepping in and sorry for the hassle! The first patch had the deletions, in the second patch I omitted them because of the "git rm" remark. In retrospect it would have been better to had the removals in a separate patch.

@comment #5
> ../include/drm-uapi/dma-buf.h:191:50: note: expanded from macro 'DMA_BUF_SET_NAME_B'
> #define DMA_BUF_SET_NAME_B      _IOW(DMA_BUF_BASE, 1, u64)
AFAICT, that is the "old" dma-buf.h. The version in 23.1.7 uses __u64 here.
